free_text: Self-supporting natural carbon foils 5 - 10 keV thick,
as determined by noting the energy shift of the
Li(p,n) threshold in lithium targets placed behind
movable surface barrier detector, a liquid air trap
and Faraday beam cup and repeller ring.
